description: We have had a great experience since 2022 using this CRM, it works great for our sales team! Some of our team are not super tech savvy and everyone seems to be able to use Claritysoft successfully.
author: Chastity S.
pros: The transition from another CRM to Claritysoft was very seamless. Very user friendly! We love the way that the Accounts, Contacts and Opportunities modules all work together.
cons: I do not like that engage does not communicate with the CRM. We would love to be able to create tasks directly from Engage for our tram based on email campaign performance.

description: Overall, positive! It's secure, well built, they've been very responsive to our requests, and I appreciate working with them.
author: Katie S.
pros: The information search is pretty easy, and I appreciate the security features especially. Being able to have certain project limited in view and scope to certain team members has been very good for client confidentiality. I appreciate how easy it is to customize views for my different potential workflows, as I wear a lot of hats at my company.
cons: I wish there were more links between the different project levels, as they feel very siloed. The contact information being siloed away from the project information, being siloed away from the client account is frankly a little strange. The high degree of user interface customizability also took some getting used to to be able to use effectively.

description: Its been ok
author: Jonathan M.
pros: My work has me using it and I have used worse and better CRM's. It is easy to navigate and use but lacks some key functions.
cons: The difficulty of uploading documents>

description: My experience has been great. It has been super easy to learn and integrate our sales plans into action
author: Simon Q.
pros: I like how user friendly it is. It is layed out very well and helps to keeps things incredibly organized. It also gives really good visibility for anything you would want to track
cons: I would say the limitations on a few of the filters and importing new data can occasionally be a bit frustrating

description: It has been really good! It helps us mainstream things and get all of our information into one place instead of multiple spreadsheets.
author: Cassandra G.
pros: We appreciate the ability to pull reports and create special reports based on how our business runs.
cons: Sometimes things are a little unclear in how to edit and change the software based on our specific needs.

description: Great experience so far - we have been using it for about two years now. Customer service has always been helpful and friendly.
author: Lisa M.
pros: Claritysoft is a very user friendly CRM. We really like that you can change the layout of your contact/account cards using their design tool, and can add or eliminate the information you want to gather. Many other CRMs come with a standard layout and their contact cards are so busy with information tabs we don't care about so its nice we can make these direct and simple. Also LOVE the opportunities board they offer. Really nice to view your sales that way!
cons: At this time, the only thing that has seemed difficult is adding the add-on in Outlook, and utilizing their email function but that could have been something on our end and not theirs.

description: For the price we're paying and how much we've customized it, I would say we're pretty satisfied and considering staying around for a good long while.
author: John P.
pros: Flexibility and quick turnaround when service or support is needed. We've been able to really customize Clarity far beyond what we originally thought was possible.
cons: Lack of true "Workflow" integrations. A lot of the newer CRM's in the market offer ways to create clear pathways for each sales type. If this, than this, then this, then this, etc.

description: Exactly what they all do, just more economically. Not sure why anyone would choose another option. Their support staff is beyond expectations.
author: Ladd N.
pros: Easy to learn, so many capabilities, great support from the team. It is easily one of the most feature rich, and economical offerings in CRM
cons: Loved it....there is nothing I did not like about Claritysoft. The app was great, desktop great, the fact that it interfaced with QuickBooks..great

review_title: A great solution for our organization
description: A great solution for our organization. Our last CRM was way too restrictive and others we looked into were just unaffordable compared to their value.
author: Jared A.
pros: Clarity was a great fit for our small-mid sized organization. Other solutions were a bit too expensive and bloated for our needs. Not to mention Clarity Engage was a great option for growth.
cons: Certain reporting features, including dashboards, felt a little restrictive. It took quite a bit of experimenting or even sometimes exporting to Excel to get exactly what we needed. The PDF Quotation feature is also very finicky.
author_profession: Growth Marketing - UX Lead Synoptix Software

description: I've used Claritysoft CRM for about 2 years after using Salesforce for a decade and Power BI for about 2 years. It is simply an address book where you can make notes of your calls.
author: Evan L.
pros: Great value and customer support. Very organized way to store contacts. Easy to put contacts at multiple locations.
cons: It can feel like a glorified Address Book at times, and doesn't have the AI features or Advanced Intel that Salesforce or Power BI have. The lack of automation, ability to print invoices, or integrate software is a con, unless you don't need that stuff.

review_title: Strong CRM Solution with Great Support and Customization Options
description: Our overall experience has been very positive. Claritysoft has streamlined our processes, improved our efficiency, and made it easier to manage customer relationships from prospecting to quoting. The platform strikes a great balance between functionality and ease of use, and the support team has been a key part of our success with it. We’re confident we made the right choice and look forward to continuing to grow with Claritysoft.
author: Elizabeth M.
pros: We love the simple, user-friendly interface and the high level of customization available. The system allowed us to get up and running quickly and tailor modules to fit our exact needs. It brought much-needed organization to our client and prospect management, and we were able to implement a quoting process within the CRM that significantly reduced the time it takes us to generate and process quotes. The customer support is also excellent—responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely helpful.
cons: Modifying the sales and quote templates wasn't as intuitive as we had hoped. It required assistance from customer support to get everything set up correctly. That said, we're glad that Claritysoft offers customization services and that their team was available to walk us through the process when needed.

review_title: Claritysoft: Easy to learn across the various roles & responsibilities of our team!
description: Overall: easy to learn for veterans and for our newer team members, and a marked upgrade from our old CRM. Looking forward to a few more usability upgrades to make our experience excellent!
author: Chris D.
pros: Our company switched from a very old, cranky CRM to Claritysoft. Claritysoft has been terrific for our newer employees and has some really nice features for us (a mid-size private tutoring company that focuses on students in grades K-12.) Interface looks nice, and tasks that were onerous in our old CRM are much less so.
cons: Lack of tabbed browsing within Claritysoft and ease of flow between, say, our student list, their parent contacts, and our tutors' projects. Claritysoft can get a little balky if I open up a second browser tab to do the kinds of tasks mentioned above; our old CRM, while creaky and annoying, was easier to move between these different workflows. Claritysoft is better in most other ways, though!

review_title: Same price - better features and flexibility
description: This is heads-and-shoulders above HS. For my particular line of work, keeping the "Leads" and "Contacts" in separate is a nice touch. But the ease of creating new fields, arranging formatting, uploading data, and activity reporting is so much easier to do with this tool. Best of all, the cost is very compatible to the competition, and without the annoying 'upsell' for feature sets that should be included.
author: Jeremy B.
pros: 1) Easy to use 2) Easy to get reports to track teammate's activities 3) Easy to filter and find records when using the mobile app 4) VERY EASY to add fields and modify record formats
cons: 1) GUI is a little bland 2) Can be a little too flexible, especially with larger teams
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Smooth Sailing After the Learning Curve
description: I’ve really grown to like Claritysoft CRM! Compared to the bulky dinosaur that was our old CRM especially, Claritysoft feels like a breath of fresh air--faster, sleeker, and so much more efficient. Once you get used to navigating it, the platform is a easy to use and makes day-to-day tasks so much smoother. The only downside is that it’s not super intuitive right out of the gate, so having a guide or walkthrough is definitely helpful. But once you get the hang of it, it’s a game-changer.
author: Caecilia S.
pros: Fast, sleek, and efficient--once you learn it, Claritysoft is a total game-changer! Highly recommend!
cons: It's not super intuitive right out of the gate, so having a guide or walkthrough is definitely helpful.

description: I have only had one issue ever and it was taken care right away by the support team. My call was answered quickly and my issue was taken care of right away.
author: Sarah R.
pros: I really like Claritysoft CRM ease of use. It is very user friendly and easy to navigate. The customer support is great.
cons: I wish that you could change the user view easier. If the user had a few more options to customize it more to their liking it would be great.

description: My overall experience is A+. The app for my iPhone is awesome. I have instant access in my hand at all times.
author: Shawn W.
pros: The value is great and, when I have any issues/problems, I get IMMEDIATE assistance and they’re always professional, knowledgeable and friendly.
cons: The only thing I dislike, and it’s minor, is the search query on the app. It’s a little quirky. The search fields don’t reset.

description: Overall this program has helped our company expand, allowed for oversight, and been a great asset. We use it to track engagements and this has been very helpful.
author: Chasity M.
pros: It is easy to use and keeps track of all the information our company needs. It works quickly, is updated often, and provides support as needed.
cons: Some of the reports are hard to get to and when a calendar is full of activities it seems like it takes forever to load.

author: Dawna W.
pros: Always reliable and can access from anywhere! If I have ever run into an issue, customer support is always there to help!
cons: I have not found anything that I do not like about Claritysoft. I did a lot of research before chosing this as my platform.

description: Overall my experience with Claritysoft has been a very positive one. Great program for staying in touch and organized with our customers.
author: Monica H.
pros: I learned alot of new tips on how to stay better organized with reminders, tasks, etc. I also learned alot of new features , ie how to move items around on lists, insert and remove etc. The new features I've learned makes clarity much more useful to me.
cons: I feel the Claritysoft program is very very indepth and that there are almost too many features, in that lots do not get used.

review_title: An easy to use solution for day-to-day task management
description: I’ve used Clarity as a tool to track students/ clients that I work with and tutor. I will say that as a software, it achieves its purpose and that is sufficient for me.
author: Alawab A.
pros: Task and workflow automation is great, and the information finding is made simple with the UI. I do not pay for the service myself so I cannot speak on the value for money.
cons: There are quite a few bugs that come with the system and have plagued my days at work when using Clarity. The customer support makes up for this though.

description: Extremely easy to add and manage accounts to keep up with your customers account history. Easy access to overview customers' accounts.
author: Natali M.
pros: The ability to create Open-Activities to complete tasks in the future and receive reminders beforehand.
cons: Filtering to find information or run certain reports but, I'm sure I might just need further training.

description: Claritysoft has been a total upgrade versus the other softwares I’ve tried, and the flexibility is also a life saver.
author: Kevin B.
pros: Claritysoft has really simplified managing my projects and keeping track of multiple loose ends, allowing me to focus more on the work at hand.
cons: Sometimes it can lag or be slow, but I think that’s just a byproduct of how many projects I have to manage.

author: Evan D.
pros: Its a nice way to keep all information filed, in a secure platform. Also quite helpful for managing that information.
cons: Website loading times can be slow. Some better UI developments and dashboards could be helpful. Organization of information/accounts isn't the easiest to navigate

description: Claritysoft overall is easy to use if you're looking for a basic tool that gets the job done. It can become confusing to find things but works well.
author: Aaron H.
pros: I use the CRM on a daily basis and like that it's fairly simple. It's easy to keep track of notes, upload and categorize leads.
cons: The app used to be terrible - after a major update within the last few days it's a little more useable now but confusing to navigate. It's also easy to miscategorize customers, leads etc and when this happens, they can be a pain to find.

description: Mostly positive, as it has allowed me to keep track of all the profiles and be able to maintain detailed notes on them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's not difficult to learn how to use Claritysoft CRM. Only a few questions have come up since using this tool and have been easily answered.
cons: I don't like that sometimes it's difficult to find certain profiles. Perhaps this is because I'm still learning how to navigate this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
